# netcat (OpenBSD)

- **License:** BSD-3-Clause
- **Upstream license:** [https://salsa.debian.org/debian/netcat-openbsd](https://salsa.debian.org/debian/netcat-openbsd)

NexUSB bundles **netcat (OpenBSD)** unmodified from the Ubuntu/Debian archive.
The link above points to the authoritative upstream license; refer to
it for the full and current terms.
